name: Ocal Browser V5.5.00 Stable
body:
OCAL BROWSER - UPDATE CATALOG
Version: 5.5.00 (Stable)
Release Date: May 23, 2026

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[STABILITY CORE: THE v5 MILESTONE]
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
* MAJOR SECURITY UPDATE: Addressed 27 high-risk vulnerabilities and refreshed 
  the entire module dependency tree.
* CHROMIUM REFRESH: Upgraded the core engine to Electron v41.2.1, ensuring 
  unmatched stability and performance with the latest web standards.
* STABILITY BASELINE: Transitioned from beta to stable production status 
  with optimized window architecture and memory management.
* ARCHITECTURE STABILIZATION: Refined the internal event-loop and resource 
  handling for long-running browser sessions.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Version: 4.4.0-beta
Release Date: April 16, 2026

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[WINDOW CONTROLS: THE MODERN LOOK]
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
* MINIMALIST CONTROLS: Completely redesigned window control buttons (Close, 
  Minimize, Maximize) with premium iconography and smoother hover interactions.
* ALWAYS-ON-TOP: Removed the legacy "Always on Top" toggle from the top bar 
  to reduce clutter and modernize the interface layout.
* ADAPTIVE BUTTONS: Controls now feature high-contrast visibility modes, 
  ensuring they remain perfectly legible against any background.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Version: 4.3.09-beta
Release Date: April 15, 2026

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[UI & AESTHETICS: GLASS 3.0]
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
* COMPLETED MODERNIZATION: Fully implemented the "Glass 3.0" design language across 
  all core browser components.
* MODAL SYSTEM: Refined the "Confirm Exit" and general modal interfaces with 
  multi-layered glass borders, high-saturation backdrop blurs, and premium 
  fade-in animations.
* TAB DEEP STYLE: Replaced complex tab gradients with a flat, minimalist 
  accent-colored side indicator to match the "Home" page aesthetic.
* FLOATING ISLANDS: Standardized 10px spacing and 16px corner rounding across 
  all web content containers.
